scripts.build:open:clear-db: bun run db:clear && bun run build:open
scripts.build:desktop: bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/web test && bun run --cwd apps/server test
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/desktop typecheck
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test
